summary: Re-verified the medium-priority fix for chip-service merging in Apex AI chat. SEO chip + qualification message now produces an admin lead with service='SEO'. Negative regression (no chip) yields service=''. /api/leads POST, /api/bookings POST, and /admin login dashboard all working.
passed: Apex AI chat flow: SEO chip click + qualification message -> admin lead saved with service='SEO', email='qa2@apex.media', phone='+971501118888', source='apex_ai_chat' (FIX CONFIRMED)
Negative regression: fresh chat with no chip + 'Hi I'm qa3@apex.media' -> lead saved with service='' (no false intent leak), source='apex_ai_chat'
POST /api/leads -> 200 with id, source defaults to contact_form
/admin UI: token login -> Leads Dashboard renders with stats and lead rows

evidence.admin_dashboard: Leads Dashboard visible after token login (TOTAL LEADS=28, BOOKINGS=8, AI CHATS=8)
